title: SigTuple is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: SigTuple is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
